evals.prompt: Generate a daily operations report for today's merged PRs and closed issues in this repository
evals.expected_output: A markdown file named ops-report-YYYY-MM-DD.md saved in the current directory, containing sections for merged PRs and closed issues from today with details like author, time, URL, and description

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: A markdown report file was created in the current directory

assertions.name: has_merged_prs_section
assertions.description: The report contains a 'Merged Pull Requests' section

assertions.name: has_closed_issues_section
assertions.description: The report contains a 'Closed Issues' section

assertions.name: has_summary_section
assertions.description: The report contains a summary with counts

assertions.name: uses_github_mcp
assertions.description: The skill used GitHub MCP tools (search_pull_requests and search_issues)

assertions.name: proper_filename_format
assertions.description: The report filename follows ops-report-YYYY-MM-DD.md format

evals.prompt: Get me today's PR and issue activity report
evals.expected_output: A markdown report showing all merged pull requests and closed issues from today in the current git repository

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: A markdown report file was created in the current directory

assertions.name: includes_pr_details
assertions.description: Merged PRs include title, author, merge time, and URL

assertions.name: includes_issue_details
assertions.description: Closed issues include title, author, close time, labels, and URL

evals.prompt: Create a daily standup report for the team showing what was accomplished today
evals.expected_output: A markdown report with merged PRs and closed issues formatted as a daily standup summary

assertions.name: report_file_created
assertions.description: A markdown report file was created

assertions.name: formatted_as_standup
assertions.description: The report has a professional format suitable for sharing with a team

assertions.name: has_activity_summary
assertions.description: The report includes a summary section with total counts
